title: Chemical truck overturned near school — fumes visible
sentences: A big tanker truck has overturned on the road and there's something leaking out.
This is on Covell Boulevard, right in front of Pioneer Elementary School.
I can see a yellowish cloud coming from the back of the truck.
It smells terrible out here, kind of like chlorine, my eyes are burning.
The school is letting kids out right now and they're walking right toward it.
The truck driver is out of the cab and he's yelling that it's industrial chemicals.
People are already coughing and some kids are sitting down on the ground.
